Item Name: Vanquish .22LR 10/22 Takedown Integrally Suppressed Barrel Black
Web Item Name: Angstadt Arms Vanquish Integrally Suppressed 10/22 Takedown Barrel .22 LR Black
Web Item Description:
The ultimate integrally suppressed 10/22 barrel is now even more portable! Introducing the Vanquish 22TD for the Ruger 10/22 Takedown rifle. The Vanquish 22TD has all the same great features as the standard model just in a more convenient travel ready format.

Enjoy subsonic performance without the need for subsonic ammo. The ported barrel of the Vanquish 22TD drops standard velocity .22LR rounds to subsonic speeds delivering an incredibly quiet shot. This barrel is a direct replacement for the Ruger 10/22 Takedown offering a simple drop-in upgrade that transforms your shooting experience.

Item Name: Bushmaster MUTA II BM556 5.56/.223 Cerakote Finish
Web Item Name: Bushmaster MUTA II BM556 Suppressor 5.56/.223 1/2x28 Black
Web Item Description:
The MUTA II is the next generation of the original Bushmaster MUTA line with the added benefit of being lighter quieter more compact than the original Bushmaster MUTA suppressor.

Effectively reducing the sound signature on 5.56 NATO and .223 Remington rounds (14.0% reduction at the left ear a 15.4% reduction at the muzzle and a 15.9% reduction at the right ear) the Muta II is the perfect tool for shooters looking to complete their Bushmaster build with a suppressor that looks the part.

With a length of 5.65 inches and a rugged Cerakote finish this suppressor is compact tough and built to dissipate heat more efficiently while shooting suppressed. The MUTA II is about more than reducing noise—it also enhances overall performance. Weighing in at only 12.25 ounces this suppressor delivers exceptional accuracy and repeatability. Additionally the threaded front cap and removable baffles allow for easy opening and cleaning of the interior of the suppressor as well.

The exterior of the Muta II is 3D-printed with Inconel 625 and the MUTA II offers unparalleled lightweight construction without compromising longevity or functionality. Its innovative design also makes it the lightest and shortest 5.56 dedicated suppressor from Bushmaster to date.

Designed to perform in all conditions the MUTA II is full auto-rated providing users with unmatched versatility and reliability. Installation and operation are effortless requiring no modifications to the platform or gas system on your rifle.
 

*SOT Required

Item Name: Dead Air Ghost 45M Modular .45 Silencer (no piston)
Web Item Name: Dead Air Silencers Ghost 45M Modular Suppressor .45 ACP Stainless Steel/Titanium Black Finish
Web Item Description:
The Ghost-M is a modular centerfire multi-caliber pistol/subgun suppressor that is rated all the way up to 300 blackout sub-sonic. It?s full-auto rated for when things get exciting and features a unique patent pending modular design. Break it down to the short configuration and you have the smallest and quietest .45 can in its class. When it?s time to be scary quiet the Long configuration is the way to go. A combination of 17-4 stainless steel titanium and anodized 7075 aluminum materials in all the right places ensure rugged reliability and minimum weight.

Specifications:

  • CALIBER RATING: 45ACP .357Mag 9mm 30 Carbine 300BLK (Subsonic)
  • ENERGY RATING: 850 ft lbs
  • BORE DIAMETER: 45ACP
  • LENGTH (SHORT): 6.2 inches

  • DIAMETER: 1.375 inches

  • WEIGHT (LONG): 12 ounces
  • MATERIALS: Stainless steel Titanium Aluminum
  • FINISH: Cerakote body Nitride attachments
  • USAGE: With stainless steel baffles you don?t have to worry about overworking the Ghost-M.

  • FULL AUTO RATED: Yes

Item Name: Daniel Defense Suppressor SoundGuard SG-556 1/2-28 BLK
Web Item Name: Daniel Defense SG-556 SoundGuard 1/2-28 Thread - Black
Web Item Description:
Daniel SoundGuard Powered by KGM Suppressors utilize cutting-edge gas-flow dynamics that eliminate over-gassing and direct most gasses forward not back in a shooter’s face. So you experience less toxic gas blowback and can concentrate on putting more shots on target. State-of-the-art KGM technology significantly lowers impulse noise levels protecting against hearing loss while a patent-pending baffle stack and proprietary coating on internal parts reduce a firearm’s flash signature to virtually zero. Patent-pending gas-flow pathing stabilizes rounds to ensure extreme accuracy with minimal point-of-impact shift.

The SG-556 is compatible with .223 and 5.56mm caliber firearms and is constructed of lightweight but extremely durable stainless steel so you don’t have to baby it and it won’t weigh down your barrel. It attaches/detaches in seconds via an included adapter utilizing the HUB standard 1.375-24 UNS which provides secure attachment while adding minimal length and allowing for the use of a variety of other muzzle attachments. Every SG-556 suppressor is stamped with the Daniel name which means it’s backed with a 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:

  • Weight: 22 oz
  • Length: 7"
  • Diameter: 1.75"
  • Materials: Stainless Steel Baffle Stack and Tube
  • Finish: Black High-Temp Cerakote
  • Thread Pitch: 1/2x28
  • Full Auto Rated!

Item Name: Daniel Defense Suppressor SoundGuard SG-30Ti 5/8-24 BLK
Web Item Name: Daniel Defense SG-30Ti SoundGuard 5/8-24 Thread - Black
Web Item Description:
Daniel SoundGuard Powered by KGM Suppressors utilize cutting-edge gas-flow dynamics that eliminate over-gassing and direct most gasses forward not back in a shooter’s face. So you experience less toxic gas blowback and can concentrate on putting more shots on target. State-of-the-art KGM technology significantly lowers impulse noise levels protecting against hearing loss while a patented baffle stack and proprietary coating on internal parts reduce a firearm’s flash signature to virtually zero. Patented gas-flow pathing stabilizes rounds to ensure extreme accuracy with minimal point-of-impact shift.

The SG-30Ti is compatible with .223 through 300 PRC caliber firearms and features an adjustable-port endcap that provides maximum recoil reduction regardless of a firearm’s caliber or configuration. It is constructed of extremely lightweight and durable titanium so you don’t have to baby it and it won’t weigh down your barrel. It attaches/detaches in seconds via an included titanium adapter utilizing the HUB standard 1.375-24 UNS which provides secure attachment while adding minimal length and allowing for the use of a variety of other muzzle attachments. Every SG-30Ti suppressor is stamped with the Daniel name which means it’s backed with a 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:

  • Weight: 15 oz (w/ mount)
  • Length: 7.75"
  • Diameter: 1.75"
  • Materials: Titanium Baffle Stack and Tube
  • Finish: Black High-Temp Cerakote
  • Thread Pitch: 5/8x24

Item Name: Surefire Suppressor 2nd Gen 5.56 - 300 WM - Black
Web Item Name: Surefire 2nd Gen Fast Attach SOCOM300-SPS Suppressor 5.56 - 300 WM - Stainless Steel Black

The SureFire SOCOM300-SPS is the answer for .300 BLK/Whisper (7.62 x 35) subsonic and supersonic ammo users seeking superior levels of sound attenuation from a precision-built suppressor. It’s also very capable in 5.56 mm and 300 WM applications. The SPS features highly specialized V-shaped baffles that promote the utmost in sound suppression for subsonic ammunition while virtually eliminating first-round flash and dust signatures. Constructed of Inconel alloy and stainless steel and CNC laser-welded it’s stealthy without sacrificing an ounce of strength. Go ahead. Make it rain.

Web Item Name: Surefire 2nd Gen Fast Attach SOCOM762-RC2 Suppressor 7.62mm Stainless Steel Black
Web Item Description:
The SureFire SOCOM762-RC2 maintains our tradition of advancing suppressor design to produce the ultimate in performance. An improved version of the SOCOM762-RC that passed the extremely demanding US Special Operations Command (SOCOM) suppressor trials with flying colors the RC2 showcases our years of expertise and dedication in producing precisely engineered suppressors out of the finest materials. You can count on it to deliver the utmost accuracy because we test every single SOCOM suppressor to ensure 100% repeatable sub-MOA impact shift and group size along with tremendous sound flash and dust signature reduction. Precision-built of advanced high-temp Inconel alloys and stainless steel and CNC laser-welded for uncompromising durability the RC2 can stand up to the harshest conditions while helping to maintain the reliability of the host weapon thanks to our unique internal baffling which reduces backpressure. Whether your projectile of choice is the 7.62x51 mm (.308) or the potent .300 WM the SOCOM762-RC2 delivers the utmost sound attenuation and a tremendous reduction in flash and dust signature.

Specifications:

  • Improved version of the US Special Operations Command suppressor trial-winning SOCOM762-RC; the SOCOM762-RC2 features the finest engineering and materials for unsurpassed performance and reliability
  • Durable high-temperature Inconel alloy/stainless-steel construction ensures tremendous dependability even with full-auto use
  • Tight tolerances and precision bore concentricity result in superior accuracy
  • Cutting-edge internal venting reduces back pressure cyclic rate and gas blowback to significantly decrease operating temperatures
  • Tremendous sound flash and dust signature reduction; virtually nonexistent first-round flash reduces user detection
  • Patented tool-less Fast-Attach® design allows quick easy attachment and removal

  • All SOCOM762-RC2 suppressors are test-fired to verify sub-1 MOA group size and point-of-impact shift

Item Name: Surefire Suppressor End Mount Titanium 7.62mm/308
Web Item Name: Surefire End Mount SOCOM762-Ti2 Rifle Suppressor 7.62mm Titanium Black
Web Item Description:
The SOCOM762-Ti2 enhances Surefire’s exceptional titanium suppressor line by providing the ultimate lightweight suppressor for 7.62 mm and .308-caliber bolt-action rifles. We designed it to exceed military sniper rifle suppressor specifications making it the ideal lightweight suppressor for hunters and long-range precision shooters alike. SureFire's strict manufacturing tolerances and exacting attention to bore concentricity and suppressor alignment result in tremendous accuracy. Constructed primarily of titanium the SOCOM762-Ti2 weighs a mere 11 ounces while maintaining our strictest durability standards so you won't even feel it at the end of your barrel. Inside its Direct Metal Laser Sintered V-shaped titanium baffle stack significantly provides an unprecedented level of baffle alignment and structural integrity. The SOCOM762-Ti2 attenuates the muzzle report significantly and our internal venting technology evenly distributes thermodynamic gases greatly reducing pressure impulse effects on the projectile as it clears the muzzle. The SOCOM762-Ti2 is a durable 7.62/.308 titanium suppressor without equal.

  • Tremendous sound flash and dust signature reduction; virtually non-existent first-round flash reduces user detection
  • Patented tool-less Fast-Attach design allows quick easy attachment and removal
  • Innovative mounting adapters feature multiple bearing surfaces for tight mating with suppressor and a precise fit
  • Tight tolerances and precision bore concentricity result in superior accuracy
  • Durable construction delivers long service life
  • Proudly designed engineered and manufactured in the U.S.A.
  • CALIBER: 7.62 mm (.308 cal)
  • CONSTRUCTION: Titanium Alloy
  • COATING: DLC and Cerakote finish
  • BODY COLORS: Black Dark Earth
  • DIAMETER: 1.5 in (3.8 cm)

Item Name: Hellion 5.56 Bullpup Rifle 16? Barrel 1-30 RD Magazine
Web Item Name: Springfield Hellion Bullpup Rifle 5.56mm NATO 30rd Magazine 16? Barrel M-LOK Handguard
Web Item Description:
The new Hellion from Springfield Armory represents a radically unique and innovative approach to firearms design helping to redefine perceptions of semi-automatic 5.56mm performance. Featuring a “bullpup” configuration where the action is located behind the trigger the Hellion features an overall length of just 28.25-inches while still possessing a 16” barrel. The Hellion sports ambidextrous controls that work in concert with a reversible case ejection system. The result is a 5.56 that combines portability with potent performance.

Features:

  • CALIBER: 5.56x45mm NATO (.223 REM)
  • COLOR: Black
  • BARREL: 16" CMV Melonite® 1:7
  • FRONT SIGHT: Integrated Flip-Up Elevation Adjustable
  • REAR SIGHT: Integrated Flip-Up w/ 5-Position Aperture Windage Adjustable
  • BOLT CARRIER GROUP: Proprietary Melonite®
  • GAS SYSTEM: 2-Position Adjustable Short Stroke Piston
  • HANDGUARD: Polymer M-Lok®
  • STOCK: 5-Position Adjustable w/ Cheek Riser
  • MUZZLE DEVICE: 4-Prong Flash Hider
  • CHARGING HANDLE: Ambidextrous Non-Reciprocating
  • SAFETY SWITCH: Ambidextrous
  • GRIP: BCMGUNFIGHTER™ Mod 3
  • MAGAZINES: (1) 30-Round Magpul PMAG Gen M3
  • WEIGHT: 8 lbs
  • LENGTH: 28.25" - 29.75"

Web Item Name: Springfield 1911 Operator AOS Handgun .45 ACP 8rd Magazine(2) 5'' Barrel  Black Frame VZ Grips
Web Item Description:
The 1911 Operator® AOS in .45 ACP delivers a cutting-edge tactical-grade pistol packed with duty-grade features that serious shooters demand. It comes equipped with G10 grips ambidextrous safety two nine-round magazines with bumper pads forward cocking serrations and an integral Picatinny rail—making it a must-have tool for self-defense. Enhanced with AOS the Operator now supports a wide variety of popular optics including RMR Shield Delta Point Pro and Docter. Each AOS plate integrates a rear sight that ensures proper optic height and an intuitive sight picture providing visible co-witnessing in nearly all optic configurations. If you're looking for a no-nonsense defensive-grade pistol in .45 ACP that’s ready to serve the Operator is your answer.

The Ronin® AOS 4.25" blends strength reliability and quality in a lightweight 9mm design. Its forged alloy frame keeps the weight around 30 ounces for easy carry while the 4.25" barrel features a traditional barrel bushing system. Item Name: SMR MRAD Fixed Stock 300 PRC 26'' Fluted W (1) 10RND MAGS BLACK
Web Item Name: Barrett SMR MRAD Fixed Stock Rifle .300 PRC 10rd Magazine(1) 26'' Fluted Barrel Black Finish
Web Item Description:
Designed with both precision and modularity in mind the MRAD is equally at home on the range or on duty.

A new addition to the award-winning MRAD product line the Single Mission Rifle (SMR).
The new MRAD SMR features the same performance of the regular MRAD along with .75 MOA accuracy but in a simplified package utilizing 90% parts commonality with the standard MRAD configuration.

The Single Mission Rifle name comes from the fact that the rifle is set from the factory in only one caliber unlike the interchangeable barrel ability of the standard MRAD. The primary distinction of the SMR is the free float barrel which is held in the upper receiver with a standard barrel nut. Additionally the non-folding stock is fixed with a vertically adjustable cheek piece and separate spacers for length of pull adjustment. These changes lead to a slimmer lighter overall rifle; trimming nearly 2 ½ lbs. off the weight and 1 inch off the overall length of the standard MRAD rifle.

Features:

  • Caliber: 300 PRC
  • Operation: Bolt Action Repeater
  • Barrel Length: 26” (660 mm)
  • Twist Rate: 1 : 8” (200 mm)
  • Overall Length: 48.5” (1232 mm)
  • Weight: 12.3 lbs (5.6 kg)
  • Mag. Capacity: 10
  • Rail Length/MOA: 21.75” (553 mm) 10 Mil

The USSOCOM Advanced Sniper Rifle (ASR) and U.S. Army Precision Sniper Rifle (PSR) contract winner.

The MK 22 defines a new class of long-range rifles by providing even greater capability within the MRAD rifle platform. With unfailing precision and Sub-MOA performance this bolt action sniper rifle adapts to a variety of user needs by converting between 7.62 x 51mm 300 NM and 338 NM calibers. The aluminum chassis features a folding stock with adjustable length of pull and cheek piece M-LOK® attachment system 10 mil rail and suppressor capable muzzle brake.

Item Name: B&T Hush Puppy Suppressor BLK MUST BUY HUSH PUPPY KIT
Web Item Name: B&T Hush Puppy Suppressor Coyote Tan - MUST BUY HUSH PUPPY KIT- KHBTHUSHPUPPYKITCSTM
Web Item Description: The unique Hush Puppy® suppressor is designed to meet the demands of those requiring a concealable 9mm suppressor that offers an excellent sound reduction to size ratio. At just 3 inches in length the Hush Puppy suppressor does not require a booster or Impuls device to function reliably and it utilizes user-replaceable wipes for the greatest level of performance possible in such a small package. Ablative material can be added between the wipes to further increase this suppressor’s performance should the user require it.

Item Name: Suppressor Pistol LUNAR 9 - 9MM
Web Item Name: Gemtech LUNAR 9 Aluminum Pistol Suppressor 9mm Luger Black Compatible with all GM-9 mounting options
Web Item Description:
The modular Lunar 9 suppressor offers two shooting configurations the ultra-quiet full-length 7” configuration and the ultra-compact 4.7” configuration. Crafted from Type III hard-coat anodized 7075 Aluminum and a 17-4 Stainless Steel blast baffle the Gemtech Lunar 9 suppressor is lightweight full-auto rated for 9mm and capable of handling as many rounds as you are.

The Gemtech® Lunar® 9 suppressor features an innovative baffle design that allows it to be converted from a longer 7" suppressor to a shorter 4.7" suppressor while still being hearing-safe. The new GEMTECH Lunar 9 suppressor is compatible with a variety of threaded barrel pistols carbines and rifles chambered for 9mm and subsonic 300 BLK that are currently on the market.

Specifications:

  • Caliber: 9MM 300BLK
  • Sound Tested: 129dBC LONG / 135dBC SHORT Glock® 17 Gen 4 | 136 dBC LONG BCM® Standard 9 300BLK

  • Tube Finish: Matte BLK Type III Hard Coat Anodize

Item Name: Tisas PX-9 2.0 Duty Comp 9mm 4.1'' Hand Gun BLK 2 Mags 18RD/20RD
Web Item Name: Tisas PX-9 2.0 Duty Comp Handgun 9mm Luger 18rd(1)&20rd(1) Magazines 4.1'' Barrel Optic Ready
Web Item Description:
The PX-9 Duty Comp is the next evolution of the proven PX-9 series. Now equipped with a match-grade barrel and a compensator port it offers exceptional recoil control for faster follow-up shots. The slide features aggressive serrations and machined cuts for reduced weight and enhanced grip. Designed with both duty and competition in mind it utilizes high-capacity P226-pattern magazines and includes a factory RMR optic cut for co-witnessing with standard sights.

Ambidextrous controls and reversible aluminum magazine release make it ideal for left- or right-handed shooters. With 27 ergonomic grip configurations upgraded aluminum trigger take-down lever and magwell this striker-fired 9mm delivers high-performance features at an unmatched value.

Notable Features:

  • Aggressive Machined Slide Cuts for Weight Reduction & Grip

  • Match-Grade Barrel with Integrated Compensator Port

  • Aluminum Flat-Faced Trigger with Tactile Reset

  • Aluminum Extended Magwell Take-Down Lever and Magazine Catch

  • Ambidextrous Slide Stop & Optional Thumb Safety

  • Co-Witness Sight Height (Glock® Pattern)

  • RMR Optic Cut with Cover Plate Installed

  • 226 Pattern Magazines – 18rd & 20rd Included

  • 27 Grip Configuration Options with Interchangeable Panels & Backstraps

  • Tenifer QPQ Finish for Corrosion and Wear Resistance

  • Striker Status & Loaded Chamber Indicators

  • 1-Year Warranty / Lifetime Service Plan

Includes:

Hard Case - 1x 18rd & 1x 20rd Magazine - Extended Magwell - Cleaning Kit - Owner's Manual - Magazine Loader - Holster - Tools

Item Name: Tisas 1911 DUTY B9R DS 9MM 5'' BLK Cerakote Ti Firing Pin Double Stack Rail
Web Item Name: Tisas 1911 Duty B9R Double Stack Handgun 9mm Luger 17rd Magazine 5'' Barrel  Black Cerakote RMS/c Optic
Web Item Description:
The Tisas 1911 Duty B9R Double Stack 1911 takes the iconic 1911 platform to the next level offering cutting-edge performance at an unbeatable value. Building on the success of last year’s models Tisas USA is doubling down on their commitment to the 1911 double-stack market by introducing a host of new upgrades all while keeping the price point accessible. This full-sized semi-automatic handgun is designed for shooters who demand both power and precision without compromising on quality.

Key Features:

  • High-Capacity Double-Stack Magazine: The B9R boasts a 17+1 round capacity offering significant firepower in a slim ergonomic package making it ideal for duty use or personal defense.
  • Bushing-Less Bull Barrel: Both the Duty and Carry models have been upgraded to a bushing-less style bull barrel featuring a precision-machined target crown. Paired with a full-length guide rod this design improves both accuracy and recoil management for a smoother shooting experience.
  • RMSc/K Slide Cuts for Optics: The B9R is optic-ready with RMSc/K slide cuts that allow direct mounting of a variety of modern red-dot sights (RDS). This feature provides a lower 1/3 co-witness with the included standard-height sights ensuring fast precise target acquisition.
  • Durable Steel Frame & Slide: The all-steel construction offers durability and a solid shooting platform while the textured polymer grips ensure a secure hold under any conditions.
  • Universal Accessory Rail: A newly designed universal type accessory rail on the frame accepts popular weapon lights and it standardizes holster fitment with other 1911 double-stack models making it easier to customize and integrate with your preferred gear.
  • Ambidextrous Safety: The ambidextrous safety allows for quick intuitive manipulation making it ideal for both left- and right-handed shooters.
  • Smooth Trigger & Hammer: A crisp smooth trigger and a commander-style hammer ensure precise controlled shots even in high-stress situations.

The PX-9 Carry Comp delivers the renowned performance of the PX-9 series in a compact carry-friendly package. Designed for everyday carry and self-defense this striker-fired 9mm balances concealability with high-capacity performance. Its match-grade barrel and compensator port provide improved recoil control for faster follow-up shots while aggressive slide serrations and machined cuts reduce weight and enhance grip.

Optimized for duty competition and self-defense the PX-9 Carry Comp features RMR optic cut ambidextrous controls and 15- and 17-round 228-pattern magazines. The polymer flared magwell ensures smooth reloads without adding unnecessary weight. With 27 grip configuration options and ergonomic controls it’s comfortable for every hand size and shooting style.

  • Caliber: 9mm Luger
  • Frame/Receiver - Slide Finish: Polymer - QPQ Tenifer
  • Sights: Fixed - Rear Black - White Dot Front

Item Name: BANISH 12 SUPPRESSOR BLACK
Web Item Name: Banish 12 Choke Mounted Shotgun Suppressor Titanium Black
Web Item Description:
Shotguns are among the most versatile and popular firearms in the hands of today’s sportsmen and women. Unfortunately pre-existing shotgun suppressors really didn’t offer the same degree of performance or utility. Luckily BANISH engineers enjoy a good challenge.  

Enter the BANISH 12. 

A first-of-its-kind shotgun suppressor the BANISH 12 sets a new standard for scattergun performance. Its all-titanium construction is both durable and lightweight – just 17.6 ounces. Paired with a corrosion-resistant Cerakote finish the BANISH 12 promises longevity from the salt-water blinds to the upland fields and turkey woods while maintaining the handling characteristics that shotgunners value. 

Designed to meet the needs of wingshooters the BANISH 12’s unique profile maintains an unobstructed sight picture from the barrel to the bead and to the bird. It attaches securely using mounts specific to your shotgun’s choke tube design for enhanced compatibility and proper alignment. The 12-gauge suppressor also comes with three interchangeable choke tubes – Improved Cylinder Modified and Full – to provide controlled patterns and quiet reports. 

BANISH the noise bring on the birds.

Built to perform under various conditions the M&P 15 AXE rifles are as versatile as they are reliable. Leveraging Gemtech’s GVAC® upper the M&P 15 AXE Rifle mitigates gas blowback in the face when running suppressed. This lightweight and rugged rifle embodies the best combination of function and form.

Proven Platform - Engineered for a wide variety of uses the M&P15 platform is as versatile as it is reliable.

Ambidextrous Controls - The bolt release magazine catch and manual thumb safety are ready for both right-hand and left-hand users.

GVAC® - Suppressor optimized upper that helps mitigate gas blowback in the face of the shooter when running suppressed. Pinned Low-Pro GVAC™ Gas Block 4140CM Steel.

  • 16.1” 1:8” twist 5R rifled barrel w/Armornite® finish.
  • Gemtech® ETM® Flash hider.
  • GVAC® mid length direct impingement gas system.
  • 15” Midwest Industries Combat M-LOK® Free-Float seven sided handguard.
  • Radian® Raptor™ charging handle.
  • M&P® tactical adjustable folding front and rear sights.
  • Ambidextrous controls.
  • Flat-face trigger.
  • Magpul® CTR® adjustable stock.
  • M&P® grip with four interchangeable backstraps.
  • Ships with (one) 30-round magazines.

Item Name: M&P FPC Blk 22LR 16.25'' Barrel 20rds
Web Item Name: S&W M&P FPC 22 Rifle .22 LR 20rd Magazines(3) 16.25'' Threaded Barrel Black Finish
Web Item Description:
Smith & Wesson’s M&P FPC 22LR features a slim and compact design that allows it to be stowed away and accessible when needed. Inspired by our M&P handguns the M&P FPC 22LR has a familiar grip and trigger can carry two extra magazines with its in-stock storage and features M-LOK slots in the forend to mount accessories. It can be field-stripped using only the grip tool - no additional tools needed.

Compact Folding Design – With the ability to fold from the side the M&P® FPC® 22LR allows you to get a compact footprint and ensures that mounted optics aren’t disturbed.

In-stock Magazine Storage – Slots in the stock allow you to store two extra magazines onboard.

Familiar Ergonomics - The same grip and trigger that can be found on our M&P pistols give you a familiar experience that you’ve come to appreciate from our firearms.

  • 16.25” 1/2x28” threaded barrel w/thread protector.
  • M-LOK® slots on handguard with Picatinny-style rail on top.
  • Charging slide/handle doubles as retainer when folded.
  • Compact side-folding design.
  • 30 3/8" unfolded length to 16 3/8” folded.
  • Flat-face trigger with crisp break.
  • Reversible magazine catch.
  • M&P Compact grip w/Interchangeable backstraps.
  • In-stock magazine storage w/quick-release tab system.
  • Ships with three magazines (Three) 20-round magazines.

Item Name: Ruger LCP MAX MStnls .380 Auto 10+1 Mag 2.80'' Barrel
Web Item Name: Ruger LCP MAX Handgun .380 Auto 10rd Magazine 2.80'' Black Oxide Barrel Loaded Chamber Indicator Stainless Slide/Black Grip Thumb Safety
Web Item Description:
Features:

  • Compact and lightweight the LCP MAX continues to be the definitive pocket-sized personal protection pistol.
  • Matte stainless steel slide features polished sides resulting in crisp cocking serrations.
  • Standard 10-round magazine ships with flush floorplate installed.
  • Textured grip frame provides a secure and comfortable grip. Utilizing the 12-round magazine or included finger grip extension floorplate with the 10-round magazine allows most shooters a full-firing grip.
  • Slide and frame surfaces and edges are smooth for comfortable carry and handling.
  • Tritium front sight with white outline makes for fast acquisition in all light conditions.
  • Rear sight features a generous u-notch for easy alignment and a square front face for one-handed cocking. Sight dovetails are sized to accept aftermarket Bodyguard-pattern sights.
  • Improved magazine feed lips feed ramp extractor and barrel cam geometries.
  • Patented barrel cam geometry delays unlocking slows the slide and ultimately reduces felt recoil compared to other .380 Auto pistols.
  • Utilizes Ruger's safe reliable and proven Secure Action™ fire-control system that combines a protected internal hammer with a bladed-safety trigger. The trigger has a short smooth pull clean break and positive reset.
  • Reversible magazine release.
  • Also includes: one 10-round magazine; soft pocket holster; magazine loader.

  • Includes a magazine disconnect and loaded chamber indicator on the top of the slide that allows for visual confirmation of a loaded or empty chamber.

Specifications:

  • Caliber: 380 Auto
  • Capacity: 10
  • Slide Material: Stainless Steel
  • Slide Finish: Matte Stainless
  • Slide Width: 0.81"
  • Manual Safety: Yes
  • Grip Frame: Black High-Performance Glass-Filled Nylon
  • Barrel Material: Alloy Steel
  • Barrel Finish: Black Oxide
  • Barrel Length: 2.80"
  • Overall Length: 5.17"
  • Front Sight: Tritium with White Outline
  • Rear Sight: Drift Adjustable
  • Weight: 10.6 oz.

Item Name: Ruger Mark IV 22/45 22 LR 4.40'' 10 RND
Web Item Name: Ruger Mark IV 22/45 Handgun .22 LR 10rd Magazines(2) 4.40'' Threaded Barrel  Picatinny Rail.
Web Item Description:
Features:

  • Simple one-button takedown for quick and easy field-stripping and proper chamber-to-muzzle cleaning. Pressing a button in the back of the frame allows the barrel-receiver assembly to tilt up and off the grip frame without the use of tools.
  • Comfortable precision-molded polymer grip frame with a serrated frontstrap and checkered backstrap.
  • 1/2"-28 threaded barrel with thread protector allows for the attachment of popular muzzle accessories.
  • Cold hammer-forged barrel results in ultra-precise rifling that provides exceptional accuracy and longevity.
  • Ergonomic bolt stop.

Item Name: Ruger American GII Patrol 308WIN 3Rd 16.1'' Thrded HB Black
Web Item Name: Ruger American GII Patrol Rifle .308 Win 3rd Capacity 16.1'' Threaded Barrel Black Splatter Stock
Web Item Description:
Features:

  • Splatter finished stock provides excellent grip without being too sharp or abrasive.
  • Soft rubber recoil pad features a large radius on the heel for easy shouldering and improved geometry that progressively collapses to reduce felt recoil.
  • Removing the installed spacer allows for length of pull to be adjusted from 13.75" to 12". Additional spacers of varying sizes for a more refined fit are available at ShopRuger.com.
  • Installed low comb improves sight alignment when using magnified optics but can be removed when utilizing low-mounted sights. More comb options are available at ShopRuger.com to further refine the fit.
  • Professionally applied Cerakote coating on barrel thread protector receiver and bolt handle results in a durable easy-to-maintain finish.
  • Bull contour barrel increases weight for better stability and reduced felt recoil.
  • Threaded barrel with factory-installed thread protector is cold hammer-forged resulting in ultra-precise rifling that provides exceptional accuracy and longevity.
  • Intuitive three-position tang safety locks the bolt preventing inadvertent bolt opening while allowing the rifle to be loaded with the safety engaged.
  • Ruger Marksman Adjustable™ trigger offers a crisp release with a pull weight that is user-adjustable between 3 and 5 pounds.
  • Patented Power Bedding™ integral bedding block system positively locates the receiver and free-floats the barrel for outstanding accuracy.
  • The one-piece bolt is CNC machined from stainless steel for smooth operation and the familiar three-lug design with 70° throw provides ample scope clearance.
  • Oversized bolt handle for positive bolt manipulation with a 5/16"-24 thread pattern for easy replacement.
  • Factory-installed one-piece Picatinny scope base.
  • Available accessory stock weight kit adds up to 1.6 pounds to the butt of the rifle to absorb recoil and improve the rifle's balance when utilizing heavier muzzle devices.
  • Also includes: one magazine; steel sling swivel studs.

 

Specifications:

  • Caliber: 308 Win
  • Stock: Black Splatter Gen II American
  • Barrel Length: 16.10"
  • Barrel Finish: Graphite Black Cerakote
  • Thread Pattern: 5/8"-24
  • Weight: 6.6 lb.
  • Capacity: 3
  • Magazine Type: AI-Style
  • Sights: None-Picatinny Scope Base
  • Material: Alloy Steel
  • Twist: 1:10" RH
  • Overall Length: 37.35"
  • Length of Pull: 12" - 13.75"
  • Grooves: 5

Item Name: Ruger American GII Patrol 556 10Rd 16.1'' Thrded HB Black
Web Item Name: Ruger American GII Patrol Rifle 5.56 NATO 10rd Magaizine 16.1'' Threaded Barrel Black Splatter Stock
Web Item Description:
Features:

  • Splatter finished stock provides excellent grip without being too sharp or abrasive.
  • Soft rubber recoil pad features a large radius on the heel for easy shouldering and improved geometry that progressively collapses to reduce felt recoil.
  • Removing the installed spacer allows for length of pull to be adjusted from 13.75" to 12". Additional spacers of varying sizes for a more refined fit are available at ShopRuger.com.
  • Installed low comb improves sight alignment when using magnified optics but can be removed when utilizing low-mounted sights. More comb options are available at ShopRuger.com to further refine the fit.
  • Professionally applied Cerakote coating on barrel thread protector receiver and bolt handle results in a durable easy-to-maintain finish.
  • Bull contour barrel increases weight for better stability and reduced felt recoil.
  • Threaded barrel with factory-installed thread protector is cold hammer-forged resulting in ultra-precise rifling that provides exceptional accuracy and longevity.
  • Intuitive three-position tang safety locks the bolt preventing inadvertent bolt opening while allowing the rifle to be loaded with the safety engaged.
  • Ruger Marksman Adjustable™ trigger offers a crisp release with a pull weight that is user-adjustable between 3 and 5 pounds.
  • Patented Power Bedding™ integral bedding block system positively locates the receiver and free-floats the barrel for outstanding accuracy.
  • The one-piece bolt is CNC machined from stainless steel for smooth operation and the familiar three-lug design with 70° throw provides ample scope clearance.
  • Oversized bolt handle for positive bolt manipulation with a 5/16"-24 thread pattern for easy replacement.
  • Factory-installed one-piece Picatinny scope base.
  • Available accessory stock weight kit adds up to 1.6 pounds to the butt of the rifle to absorb recoil and improve the rifle's balance when utilizing heavier muzzle devices.
  • Also includes: one magazine; steel sling swivel studs.

Item Name: HUXWRX FLOW 556k (FDE) Suppressor w/o Muzzle Device
Web Item Name: Huxwrx Flow 556K Suppressor 5.56 FDE w/Out Muzzle Device
Web Item Description:
An innovative multi-caliber suppressor with patented and proven Flow-Through and Torque Lock technology. It is designed to reduce signature without negatively impacting cycling or service life. The FLOW 556k is DMLS printed in 17-4 Stainless. It delivers superior toxic fume exposure mitigation flash reduction sound reduction recoil reduction accuracy and repeatability by its unique Flow-Through helical coil and core deflector design. It is full-auto rated and compatible on 5.56 17 HMR and 5.7 platforms. The integrated GeoFlash Cap geometry effectively mitigates flash as part of its overall signature reduction funtionality.

Compatible with Muzzle Brake-QD 556 and Flash Hider-QD 556.

Item Name: HUXWRX VENTUM 762 Suppressor
Web Item Name: Huxwrx Ventum 762 Suppressor 7.62 with 5/8x24
Web Item Description:
Evolution at its finest—the VENTUM 762 brings HUB compatible Flow-Through technology to the next level. Named for its function this new HUXWRX suppressor makes 5.56 6.5 and 7.62 calibers a “breeze”. With a removeable 3D-printed Grade 5 Titanium core and 17-4 stainless steel suppressor housing the VENTUM 762 is easily serviceable and provides all the benefits of true Flow-Through technology including toxic fume mitigation improved sound performance and excellent repeatability. Full-auto rated and direct thread ready this multi-caliber suppressor is versatile with a detachable GeoFlash cap and comes ready to accept universal HUB and Stiction mounting systems. The universal HUB mounting system will allow adapters such as Xeno KeyMo and ASR plus other approved mounting systems. It is cross-platform functional and ideal for bolt and lever action centerfire submachine gun bullpup and AK platforms.

With the Flow-Through design no significant modifications to the platform or gas system are required to install or operate this suppressor.

Flow-Through technology cycles and redirects expanding gases in a helical pattern away from the bore-line through the front of the suppressor and away from the shooter’s face eyes and lungs.

Ships with a 5/8x24 direct thread adapter.

Item Name: HUXWRX VENTUM 556 Suppressor
Web Item Name: Huxwrx Ventum 556 Suppressor 5.56 with 1/2x28
Web Item Description:
The latest in the VENTUM series—the VENTUM 556 brings HUB compatible Flow-Through technology to dedicated 5.56 weapon systems. With a removeable 3D-printed Grade 5 Titanium core and 17-4 stainless steel suppressor housing the VENTUM 556 is easily serviceable and provides all the benefits of true Flow-Through technology including toxic fume mitigation improved sound performance and excellent repeatability. Full-auto rated and direct thread ready this multi-caliber suppressor is versatile with a detachable GeoFlash cap and comes ready to accept universal HUB and Stiction mounting systems. The universal HUB mounting system will allow adapters such as Xeno KeyMo and ASR plus other approved mounting systems. It is cross-platform functional and ideal for bolt and lever action centerfire submachine gun bullpup and AK platforms.

With the Flow-Through design no significant modifications to the platform or gas system are required to install or operate this suppressor.

Flow-Through technology cycles and redirects expanding gases in a helical pattern away from the bore-line through the front of the suppressor and away from the shooter’s face eyes and lungs.

Ships with a 1/2x28 direct thread adapter.

Item Name: HUXWRX FLOW Range 36 Ti Black
Web Item Name: Huxwrx Flow Range 36 Ti Suppressor 9mm Luger Hub QD Adapter Black
Web Item Description:
The FLOW Range 36 Ti is the ultimate choice for versatility. It's perfect for first-time suppressor buyers or anyone seeking a single all-purpose suppressor. This extremely lightweight multi-caliber suppressor features hybridized Flow-Through technology offering superior performance across various platforms. Its enhanced GeoFlash Cap with extended lugs makes installation and removal hassle-free. The suppressor is fully optimized for pistols rifles PCCs and sub-guns ensuring optimal performance in every application. Crafted from high-quality Grade 5 titanium and fully 3D-printed the FLOW Range 36 Ti is built to last. Its design also incorporates stiction mounting and hub adapter capability further enhancing its versatility. The FLOW Range 36 Ti is fully-auto rated and has no barrel restrictions. No modifications to the platform or gas system are required to install or operate this suppressor.

  • WEIGHT: 8.4oz / 238g — 12oz / 340g with included HUB QD adapter
  • CALIBER: Pistol calibers up to 9mm; Rifle calibers 17 HMR–.338 Lapua .338 arc 8.6 blkout
  • MATERIALS: S Suppressor: Grade 5 Titanium HUB QD adapter: 17-4 Heat Treated Stainless Steel
  • COATINGS: Suppressor: C-Series Cerakote Matte Black (Flat Dark Earth available) HUB QD adapter: DLC/Black Nitride
  • TECHNOLOGY READINESS: TR Level 9 Fully developed in production
  • MOUNTS: Ships with HUB QD adapter; 3-LUG HUB stiction and direct thread adapters available.
  • BARREL LENGTH: No restrictions
  • DURABILITY: Passes 6 cycles of the SOCOM Reliability Stress Test. (1 cycle=8x30 round magazines)
  • MAINTENANCE: Detailed cleaning should be performed every 2000 rounds.

Item Name: SIG SUPPRESSOR MODX-45 .45  TI .578X28 AND M16X1LH MODULAR
Web Item Name: Sig Sauer MODX-45 Suppressor .45 Auto Thread .578 in - 28 tpi & M16 x 1 mm LH Black
Web Item Description:
The newest pistol suppressor line from SIG SAUER features completely modular and configurable titanium baffles for the ultimate lightweight performance that allows the user to personalize their suppressor for overall length weight and sound. The MOD-X9 and MOD-X45 provide class-leading sound performance and can be easily disassembled and reconfigured with fewer baffles when your priority is size over sound. The MOD-X suppressors feature 21 points of impact adjustment and come with a fixed barrel spacer for carbine use. Each MOD-X suppressor includes the most popular Imperial and Metric piston for its given caliber.

Features:

  • Segmented Titanium 3D-Printed
  • Titanium Baffles
  • The Shooter can adjust the number of baffles to shape the overall length when size is more important than sound performance
  • Includes two pistons (.578x28 and M16x1LH)
  • Multi-Caliber capable with accessory pistons (MODX-45 only)

Item Name: YHM SIDEWINDER M2 9MM SUPPRESSOR 1/2''-28
Web Item Name: YHM 9mm Sidewinder M2 Direct Thread Suppressor 9mm Luger Aluminum/Steel Black 1/2?-28
Web Item Description:
The Sidewinder M2 is user serviceable which allows both the baffle and Nielsen device to be removed for cleaning and maintenance using the provided disassembly tool.
The booster system has been completely redesigned and now uses the industry’s unofficial standard piston. The redesign also includes the ability to swap pistons without the use of tools thanks to a new rear cap. The front cap has been redesigned to allow for better engagement with the takedown tool to make the service process easier.
YHM's Nielsen device enables flawless semi-automatic operation on all relevant host pistols. The Sidewinder M2 has 12 index points that allow you to adjust point of impact while our device remains attached to the host firearm. The average dry sound signature of the Sidewinder M2 9mm when testing to Mil-Std 1474D is 125 dB dry on a Glock G17 using 147gr. FMJ ammo. Shooting the suppressor “wet” will net even quieter results.

  • Caliber: 9mm
  • Weight: 8.8oz./10.2 w/Piston
  • Length: 8.2”/8.35” w/Piston
  • Diameter: 1.375”
  • Construction: Aircraft Quality Aluminum & 17-4 Ph SS
  • Mount: 1/2”-28 RH Piston
  • Decibel Rating: 125 dB
  • Full Auto Rated
  • Can be used on .300 BLK SUBSONIC with a 7.5" or longer barrel.

The average dry sound signature of the Sidewinder M2 9mm when testing to Mil-Std 1474D is 125 dB dry on a Glock G17 using 147gr. FMJ ammo. Shooting the suppressor “wet” will net even quieter results.

  • Decibel Rating: 125 dB

Item Name: YHM RESONATOR R2 .30 CALIBER SUPPRESSOR
Web Item Name: YHM Resonator R2 QD Suppressor .30 Cal Stainless Steel/Cobalt 6 Black 5/8-24?
Web Item Description:
YHM’s .30 caliber sound suppressor the Resonator® R2 was created to provide the shooting enthusiast with a quiet lightweight and cost effective suppressor. The notched rim and tri-port muzzle on the end cap make it stand out among the crowd. Capable of being used on multiple calibers and host weapons the Resonator® R2 can be used on rifle calibers ranging from .17 HMR through 300 RUM making it a great choice for all shooters. The Resonator® R2 uses a tubeless design which consists of heat treated 17-4 stainless steel and a Cobalt 6 blast baffle which allows the suppressor to be full-auto rated and designed for rigorous use.
The Resonator® ships with the Phantom® Q.D. Adapter (1) YHM-2007 (1) YHM-2146 and a YHM-4302-MB-24a.

  • 20" Remington 700 shooting .308 Winchester 147 grain measured 135Db
  • 16" 6.8mm AR-15 shooting 110 grain measured 132.5Db
  • 14.5" 5.56mm AR-15 shooting 55 grain measured 132Db
  • Caliber: .30
  • Weight: 13 oz./16 oz. w/Q.D. adapter
  • Length: 6.95”/7.825” w/Q.D. adapter - 5/8-24” threads
  • Diameter: 1.5625”
  • Construction: 17-4 Ph SS/Cobalt 6 Blast Baffle
  • Mount: Phantom Q.D. HUB adapter
  • Decibel Rating: 135 dB
  • Minimum Barrel Lengths:

    5.56 NATO 6.8SPC 7.62x39: 10”
    .300 Win Mag / 300 RUM: 20”
    300 Blackout: 7.5”
  • Full Auto Rated

Web Item Description:
The Resonator K was designed to provide the shooting enthusiast with a quiet lightweight and cost effective suppressor for the high-caliber shooter looking to shed some weight and reduce their footprint. The blast chamber is threaded to the popular 1-3/8”-24 HUB thread which allows it to utilize many available mounting options. The end cap design greatly reduces flash signature. Item Name: YHM R9 9MM SOUND SUPPRESSOR 1/2''-28 DIRECT THREAD
Web Item Name: YHM R9 9mm Suppression System Direct Thread Suppressor 9mm Luger Stainless Steel 1/2''-28
Web Item Description:
YHM makes it work across the board so that you the shooter can enjoy versatility across your entire arsenal all at a budget-friendly price while maintaining that rugged durability you’ve come to expect from YHM®. This was the intent with the R9® 9mm. The primary goal was a 9mm suppressor capable of handling high volumes of fire and the ability to run other calibers such as .300 BLK and .308 Win. It was primarily focused on suppressing 9mm (specifically sub-machine guns and SBRs).

The R9® is capable of being used on a handgun in conjunction with our Nielsen Booster Assembly and accepts our full line-up of HUB mounting options.

The R9® ships with a 1/2" - 28 Direct Thread HUB Adapter and (1) YHM-2007 and (1) YHM-2146.

The Turbo® T3 includes a 1/2”x 28 Phantom Q.D. Muzzle Brak a Phantom® Q.D. Adapter
and (1) YHM-2007 and (1) YHM-2146.

The Turbo® T3 is made from heat-treated 17-4 stainless steel and a Cobalt 6 blast baffle. The combination of
these materials allow the suppressor to be fully auto-rated and designed for rigorous use.

  • Caliber: 5.56mm
  • Weight: 12.8 oz. w/adapter
  • Length: 5.59”/6.5” w/adapter
  • Diameter: 1.5625”
  • Construction: 17-4 Ph SS/Cobalt 6 blast baffle
  • Mount: Phantom 1/2” x 28 Q.D. HUB adapter
  • Decibel Rating: 134 dB
  • Minimum Barrel Lengths:
    • 5.56 NATO: 10” Minimum barrel length.
  • Full Auto Rated

Web Item Description:
This 5.56 NATO Suppressor features reduced blowback-when compared to the previous model. The Turbo® K-RB utilizes a tubeless design made from heat treated 17-4 stainless steel along with a Cobalt 6 blast baffle. The combination of these materials allows the suppressor to be full auto rated and designed for rigorous use. The blast chamber of the Turbo® K-RB is threaded to the popular 1.375”-24 HUB thread which allows it to utilize many available mounting options. The notched rim and tri-port muzzle on the end cap make it stand out among the crowd.
The Turbo® K-RB is built with the same care quality and attention to detail that has defined the YHM® brand for generations.
The Turbo® K-RB ships with the 1/2” x 28 Phantom® Q.D. adapter (1) YHM-2007 (1) YHM-2146 and Q.D. flash hider.

Item Name: YHM FAT CAT 5.56MM SUPPRESSOR with sRx MOUNT
Web Item Name: YHM Fat Cat 5.56mm QD Suppressor w/Mini sRx Muzzle Brake 5.56mm Stainless Steel/Cobalt 6 Black 1/2x28
Web Item Description:
This 5.56 NATO suppressor sports new baffle geometry resulting in reduced blowback. Built with the same care quality and attention to detail that has defined the YHM® brand for generations the Fat Cat® was created to provide a compact suppressor with great sound. The Fat Cat® is made from 17-4 stainless steel along with a Cobalt 6blast baffle. The combination of these materials allows the suppressor to be full auto-rated and designed for rigorous use. The overall length measures just 4.5” with the sRx® adapter installed. That’s a full inch shorter than our Turbo K model with its included adapter. The Fat Cat’s larger 1.94” diameter creates more internal volume resulting in a lower more pleasant tone. With an average sound pressure level of 139dB at the muzzle the Fat Cat® is quite the performer for its size. Available in either standard or Cat’s Ass endcap.
The Fat Cat® includes the sRx® 1/2” x 28 QD Adapter Mini sRx® Muzzle Brake (1) YHM-2007 and (1) YHM-2146.

All YHM products are also backed by our Limited Lifetime Manufacturer’s Warranty.

  • Caliber: 5.56mm
  • Weight: 11.2 oz./Adapter 13.2 oz
  • Length: 4.25”/Adapter 4.50”
  • Diameter: 1.94”
  • Construction: 17-4 Ph SS/Cobalt 6 Blast Baffle
  • Mount: sRx® 1/2” x 28 Q.D. HUB Adapter
  • Decibel Rating: 139 dB
  • Minimum Barrel Lengths:
    5.56 NATO: 10” Minimum barrel length.
  • Full Auto Rated

The overall length measures just 4.5” with the sRx® adapter installed. That’s a full inch shorter than our Turbo K model with its included adapter. The Fat Cat’s larger 1.94” diameter creates more internal volume resulting in a lower more pleasant tone. With an average sound pressure level of 139dB at the muzzle the Fat Cat® is quite the performer for its size. Available in either standard or Cat’s Ass endcap.
The Fat Cat® includes the sRx® 1/2” x 28 QD Adapter Mini sRx® Muzzle Brake (1) YHM-2007 and (1) YHM-2146.

All YHM products are also backed by our Limited Lifetime Manufacturer’s Warranty.

Web Item Description:
Q's first-ever Premium Steel Silencers developed in conjunction with 8.6 BLK. That’s right these silencers were made for the mighty big brother to .300 BLK. Q's deep draw process makes their steel cans more affordable wildly durable and lighter than any steel silencer on the market. Hell it’s lighter than any titanium silencers on the market!  Quickly move your silencer back and forth from your Fix to your BoomBox with ease. Q has brought their Steel line into the modern age using laser welds for greater consistency enhanced durability and a quality aesthetic.

Designed for military application Q's steel cans do not spark like titanium. They even went through the trouble to put a Nitride finish on the can that not only looks sexy but won’t scratch or burn off.

The Short Chop (three less baffles) is for hunting and compact maneuverability while the Porq Chop’s length is ideal for maximum stealth.
